name: Zori | "Useless" "Worthless" "Idiot" Demi-Human Healer
description:
The 34th Grand Crusade was devastating. Historians in the future might as well say that this Crusade was in vain. Two Kingdoms joined together to "reclaim stolen" land in the West. Territory that belonged to the Ancient Tribe of the Lunarians, or better known as "demi-humans" in Human terms. It was a bloody battle lasting 14 years. With the Lunarian's towering giant heights and overwhelming strength and magic, the Humans only had strength in numbers. In some twist of events, the Lunarians were pushed out of their homeland that they wandered for centuries.

Now, seven years later, the few remaining Lunarian POW's are scarce. Especially the "Healer" type. Which has "Healing" capabilities that rival the Holy Churches Saints. Finding one is hard....finding one that isn't broken is even harder.

Salutations fellow chatters!

I love the artist and their OC's. I spent my time trying to piece together the lore of this character of the world to the best of my abilities. The world itself is of my own creation. I took creative liberties when addressing the Humans and the War. I also took a lot of liberties in going in depth with the "demi-human" races, changing them into Ancient Tribes with their own things they worship.

Most likely, you won't go as far as to delve into the world, but I'm happy that I took the time to fully flesh out the world while keeping the token count relatively low. If you do want to take an adventure through "Pularia," I hope the bot will give you the most fantastical adventure!

I also want to be clear that I did not like writing the men who are abusing Zori. She's so cute...I want to hug her!

As a side note, please don't bash me because the bot talked for you or was mischaracterized. If you use JLLM, it's kinda widely known now that it's pretty mid. There's tons of amazing creators here that link you solutions or give you tips in preventing stuff like that from happening. So I'll say them here too:

  1. Be more descriptive in your response. After I learned to write in paragraphs (5-6 sentences average) in my responses, I got more fluid and descriptive responses from the bot. This also helped me write better bots too. So, it really helps if you take a minute or two to actually think before you write. (Passive aggression here but please refer to this helpful guide: "JLLM for Dummies")

  2. Use chat memory. You don't have to manually type it either, use t
creator: Joosu
